title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Atlas, CP0 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Evaruate all researchers and workers! Let atlas move back to the labophase!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare Seraphim S-snake, S-Hawk, & S-Shark for Battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare Seraphim S-snake, S-Hawk, & S-Shark for Battle!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Let Sentomaru take charge of them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you take me out to the sea after I pack my belongings, quasar?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't make it sound like we're going on a field trip, old man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Are you disappearance will most likely be a worldwide major incident ya know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, you have a funny- looking head so I guess it's fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's your selection Stan- DARD??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well then,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to go up. It will become a battlefield down here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want you to bring Bonney to the Labo phase above those clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll be waiting uptop.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: eeh!??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He vanished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey old man apple!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All these futuristic stuff are really making my head hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey!! They even got a monster!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GAA- AAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UWAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Shoot them down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Guns are not working on that thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always wanted to fight these things,.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A creature that doesn't exist in the sea..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're a space monster, aren't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Tempest Kick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's useless...

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: That thing is a hologram.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Say that earlier won't ya!?

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: Looks like you're well informed, Stussy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes. It's quite nostalgic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While I'm flying, I'll go see what's above those clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If vegapunk is here, he'd probably be over there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There are 2 lines in the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you see them, Lucci?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
